dashboard.label: Overview
dashboard.definition: {"title":"Overview","description":"Wearables platform overview","visualizations":{"ov_md":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"# Wearables Health Vendor-neutral health dashboards on the **Wearables data model** — one set of panels that work across devices (**Oura** today; **Garmin** next). ## Quick start 1. Create **`index=wearables`** (Settings → Indexes, or ACS on Cloud). 2. Install + restart Splunk: - **TA-oura** (Oura normalization) — plus **TA-garmin** for Garmin. - **wearables** — this app (data model + dashboards). - **hypnogram_viz** + **charge_ring_viz** — custom visualizations used by the dashboards. 3. Run the vendor ingest (repo-only tooling — needs a Splunk HEC token; never shipped in the app): - **Oura:** `oura_to_hec_with_phi.py` (OAuth token → HEC `index=wearables`). - **Garmin:** `garmin_to_hec.py` (Path B via `python-garminconnect`) — see TA-garmin's `INSTALL.md`. 4. Populate the admin KV registries: **`wearable_person_profile`** (`person_id` → name / goals) and **`wearable_device_profile`** (`device_id` → friendly name). 5. Open the dashboards: **Today · Sleep · Heart · Activity · Wellness · Device**. ## How it fits together - **Per-vendor add-ons** (`TA-oura`, `TA-garmin`, …) ingest each device's data and normalize it into canonical fields (`total_sleep_min`, `avg_hr`, `steps`, …) + vendor-neutral tags. - The **Wearables data model** (Sleep / HeartRate / Activity / Workout / Daily / Device) exposes those canonical fields — the dashboards read **only** the model, so a new vendor just works. - **Ingest scripts live in each vendor add-on's `tools/`** (repo-only, excluded from the `.spl` since they hold credentials). ## Access & identity - Every event carries an indexed **`person_id`** (opaque) + **`vendor`**, stamped at ingest. - Per-person isolation is enforced by role **`srchFilter`** on `person_id` (RBAC). - Names / goals / device names come from admin-managed KV lookups (never the access gate). ## Repositories - **Wearables app** (this): github.com/narwhaldc/wearables - **Oura add-on** — TA-oura: github.com/narwhaldc/TA-oura - **Garmin add-on** — TA-garmin: github.com/narwhaldc/TA-garmin - **Hypnogram viz**: github.com/narwhaldc/hypnogram_viz - **Charge / Ring viz**: github.com/narwhaldc/charge_ring_viz - **Legacy single-vendor app** — oura_health: github.com/narwhaldc/oura-health-splunk ## Status First-pass quick start. Dashboards are migrating off the single-vendor **oura_health** app (the GA fallback). Requires `index=wearables`, `TA-oura`, and person_id-based RBAC. ","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}}},"dataSources":{},"inputs":{},"layout":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1440,"height":760,"display":"auto"},"structure":[{"item":"ov_md","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":1400,"h":720}}],"globalInputs":[]}}
